choose.when: order by records.updated_time asc, records.record_id asc
order by records.name asc, records.updated_time desc, records.record_id desc
order by records.score is null asc, records.score desc, records.updated_time desc, records.record_id desc
order by records.score is null asc, records.score asc, records.updated_time desc, records.record_id desc
order by records.name desc, records.updated_time desc, records.record_id desc
order by records.module asc, records.updated_time desc, records.record_id desc
order by records.status asc, records.updated_time desc, records.record_id desc
choose.otherwise: order by records.updated_time desc, records.record_id desc
